economic_notes: First Nation owns Petro Canada C-Store/Gas Station and Tim Horton's Food Partner Project. Daxet Development Corporation (100% owned GBE) had total revenue of $7,095,516 in 2021. Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20% interest GBE). T'Sou-ke Economic Development Limited Partnership (99.99% interest, inactive). Four lawsuits filed related to the Petro Canada/Tim Hortons project.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors unable to satisfy themselves on carrying value of Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. investment as 2021 financials were not available during audit; based on March 31, 2020 financials. Equity in earnings line of $475,147 appears in revenue but cash flow shows investment outflow of $475,147 suggesting this may be an advance rather than earnings - requires scrutiny. GBEs include Daxet Development Corporation (100%), Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20%), and T'Sou-ke Economic Development Limited Partnership (99.99%, inactive). Contingent liabilities total approximately $6.6M including housing loan guarantees and Bank of Montreal loan guarantee for Daxet. Four active lawsuits related to Petro Canada/Tim Hortons project. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculation excludes equity in earnings from government transfers.
